originalTitle: United Airlines says it will ‘look into’ worker’s threat to call ICE in viral video
summary: United staffer told customer ‘you don’t act like at a citizen’ during incident over wait time at San Francisco airport
content: United Airlines is “looking into” a viral video showing a United Airlines employee threatening to call Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) on Mexican American man at San Francisco international Airport last week. The scene erupted after Julio Varela of San Ramon grew upset at United Airlines staff for taking a long time to correct an error his family made when entering his daughter’s name to buy a ticket for flight to Canada, according to NBC News. After three hours of waiting and a sour exchange with a United Airlines staffer, Varela pulled out his phone and demanded the woman to identify her self. “I’m asking for your name so I can report you,” Varela said in a video that has attracted wide attention. The United staffer responded by pulling out her own phone and recording him. “Maybe we should call ICE on you,” the woman replied. “You don’t act like a citizen.” Ramon, who is a naturalized citizen, grew still more angry after that comment. “Call ICE on me, lady,” the man says. The two then trade volleys, with Varela repeatedly saying “say it again” as she responds: “Get out my face.” “United Airlines has a racist customer service lady!” Varela yells. “She’s lazy as hell!” Another United Airlines staffer can be seen sighing and rolling her eyes. “We’re looking into the interaction in this video, but don’t have anything additional to share at this time,” the airline wrote in an emailed statement. Varela expressed concern about possibly being detained by ICE upon his return to the United States from Montreal, despite being a US citizen. But nothing happened when he returned, according to NBC News.
chineseTitle: 美联航表示将“调查”员工在病毒视频中威胁打电话给 ICE 的行为
chineseSummary: 在旧金山机场等待期间发生的事件中，美联航工作人员告诉乘客“你的行为不像公民”
chineseContent: 美国联合航空正在“调查”一段疯传的视频，该视频显示一名联合航空员工上周威胁要向旧金山国际机场的墨西哥裔美国人打电话给移民和海关执法局 (ICE)。据 NBC 新闻报道，圣拉蒙市的胡利奥·瓦雷拉 (Julio Varela) 对联合航空公司的工作人员感到不满，因为他们花了很长时间才纠正他的家人在输入女儿的名字购买飞往加拿大的机票时犯下的错误，这一事件爆发了。经过三个小时的等待以及与联合航空公司工作人员的不愉快的交流后，瓦雷拉拿出手机，要求该女子表明身份。 “我询问你的名字，这样我就可以举报你，”瓦雷拉在一段引起广泛关注的视频中说道。曼联工作人员拿出自己的手机，给他录音。 “也许我们应该打电话给 ICE 来抓你，”这位女士回答道。 “你的行为不像一个公民。”雷蒙是一名入籍公民，听完这番言论后，他更加愤怒了。 “女士，给 ICE 打电话，”该男子说道。然后两人互相截击，瓦雷拉反复说“再说一遍”，她回答说：“滚出我的脸。” “联合航空有一位种族主义客户服务女士！”瓦雷拉喊道。 “她真是太懒了！”可以看到另一名联合航空工作人员叹了口气，翻白眼。该航空公司在一份电子邮件声明中写道：“我们正在调查这段视频中的互动，但目前没有任何其他信息可以分享。”瓦雷拉对从蒙特利尔返回美国后可能被 ICE 拘留表示担忧，尽管他是美国公民。但据美国全国广播公司新闻报道，他回来后什么也没发生。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
